title: Construct conservation earthworks
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Construct conservation earthworks demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for construction

pcs.text: Confirm construction details, sequence and specifications from site and construction plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm construction details, sequence and specifications from site and construction plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm construction details, sequence and specifications from site and construction plans.

pcs.text: Identify and locate worksite and surveyed work according to maps and site plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and locate worksite and surveyed work according to maps and site plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and locate worksite and surveyed work according to maps and site plans.

pcs.text: Select, check and prepare machinery and equipment required for construction work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and prepare machinery and equipment required for construction work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and prepare machinery and equipment required for construction work.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Verify the suitability of equipment and attachments for terrain and construction work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify the suitability of equipment and attachments for terrain and construction work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify the suitability of equipment and attachments for terrain and construction work.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for construction

elements.title: Carry out conservation earthworks construction work

pcs.text: Operate machinery and equipment according to industry endorsed earthwork methods and patterns
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate machinery and equipment according to industry endorsed earthwork methods and patterns?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate machinery and equipment according to industry endorsed earthwork methods and patterns.

pcs.text: Monitor and maintain optimum machinery loads in accordance with prevailing conditions and manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and maintain optimum machinery loads in accordance with prevailing conditions and manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and maintain optimum machinery loads in accordance with prevailing conditions and manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Operate machinery safely using techniques suitable for terrain, site conditions and other operators and site worker safety
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate machinery safely using techniques suitable for terrain, site conditions and other operators and site worker safety?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate machinery safely using techniques suitable for terrain, site conditions and other operators and site worker safety.

pcs.text: Construct earthworks according to specifications, workplace procedures and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Construct earthworks according to specifications, workplace procedures and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Construct earthworks according to specifications, workplace procedures and legislative requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out conservation earthworks construction work

elements.title: Apply finishing techniques

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Finish batters and surfaces?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Finish batters and surfaces.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Retain site features and vegetation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Retain site features and vegetation.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clear site and remove debris?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clear site and remove debris.

pcs.text: Complete topsoiling of disturbed areas and surfaces
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete topsoiling of disturbed areas and surfaces?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete topsoiling of disturbed areas and surfaces.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Apply finishing techniques

elements.title: Finalise work

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete work records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete work records.

pcs.text: Clean, store and maintain machinery, tools and equipment according to environmental and biosecurity requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, store and maintain machinery, tools and equipment according to environmental and biosecurity requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, store and maintain machinery, tools and equipment according to environmental and biosecurity requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Finalise work
